MV VOSCO TRADER (58K/12) - OPEN FUZHOU ( EX DD ) CHINA 31 DEC - 3 JAN

+++
MV VOSCO TRADER
(EX ELEEN EVA)
IMO: 9527415
BUILT 2012, JAPAN / FLAG: PANAMA / CLASS: NKK
DWT: 58,215 ON 12.93M SWD
GT/NT: 32,714 / 19,015
LOA/BM: 189.93/32.26M
5 HOLDS/ 5 HATCHES
HATCH COVERS: MACGREGOR – HYDROLIC END FOLDING TYPE
PNI : WEST OF ENGLAND
CBC BREAK DOWN BY HOLDS - GRAIN/BALE IN CBM :
NO 1 - 13,245.83           12,697.39
NO 2 - 15,441.14           14,789.60
NO 3 - 15,136.07           14,458.58
NO 4 - 15,445.66           14,799.57
NO 5 - 13,873.65           13, 438.47
TTL:  GRAIN 73,142 / BALE 70,183 CBM
CRANES 4 X 30 MTS + 4 GRABS X 12 CBM
- FULL SPEED
BALLAST ABT 13.0KNTS ON ABT 25.50 MTS VLSFO + 0.1 MTS LSMGO
LADEN ABT 12.5KNTS ON ABT 25.50 MTS VLSFO + 0.1 MTS LSMGO
- ECO SPEED (WOG)
BALLAST ABT 11.5 KNTS ON ABT 21.50 MTS VLSFO + 0.1 MTS LSMGO
LADEN ABT 11.0 KNTS ON ABT 21.50 MTS VLSFO + 0.1 MTS LSMGO
- IN PORT -
IDLE ABT 2.4 MTS VLSFO + ABT 0.1 MTS LSMGO
CRANES WORKING ABT 5.4 MTS VSLFO + ABT 0.1MTS LSMGO
ALL DETS ABT
C/P SPEED & CONSUMTION UNDER GOOD WEATHER CONDITION, CALCULATED AS WHOLE DAYS (FROM NOON TO NOON), UP TO AND INCLUDING BEAUFORT FORCE 4 AND/OR DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENT OR NEGATIVE INFLUENCE BY SWELL. DSS 3 TO MEAN WAVE A/O SWELL HEIGHT OF 1.25M OR LESS.
IF TRIM RESTRICTIONS IN PORTS AND VESSEL IS REQUIRED TO SAIL WITH LESS THAN 0.40M STERN TRIM, ADDITIONAL 0.5 MT/DAY TO LADEN CONSUMPTION AND 7% ALLOWANCE ON SPEED (FOR ABOUT, I/O 5%).
SPEED AND CONSUMPTION APPLIES TO SDWT/CORRESPONDING DISPLACEMENT. IF SAILING WITHIN TROPICAL ZONE AND SDWT IS EXCEEDED, ABOVE SPEED AND CONSUMPTION MAY VARY.
IN SHALLOW WATERS – UNDER 2.5X OF VSL’S DRAFT SPEED/CONSUMPTION AFFECTED.
TANKTOP STRENGTH:
HOLD NO. 1/3/5: 21.4 TON/M2
HOLD NO. 2 /4: 18.7 TON/M2
HATCHCOVER STRENGTH:
HATCH NO. 1:  4.1 TON/M2
HATCH NO. 2-5: 3.4 TON/M2
HATCH DIMENSIONS (L x B):
HATCH NO. 1:      17.43M x 19.20M
HATCH NO. 2-5:  20.75M x 19.20M
